purpose: Source registry for direct ATS/job-board adapters. Prefer direct public JSON/API endpoints before search-engine fallback.

greenhouse.coverage: High for companies using boards.greenhouse.io or job-boards.greenhouse.io.
greenhouse.company_token_source: Board slug in URLs such as https://boards.greenhouse.io/{board_token} or https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/{board_token}.
greenhouse.notes: Best first adapter: official public JSON, no auth for GET endpoints. Need a board-token watchlist or token discovery from Google results.

lever.company_token_source: Company slug in URLs such as https://jobs.lever.co/{company}.
lever.notes: Strong second adapter. Some companies expose posting lists cleanly; old/closed postings still need filtering.

ashby.coverage: Growing among startups and AI companies using jobs.ashbyhq.com.
ashby.company_token_source: Organization slug in URLs such as https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/{organization}.
ashby.notes: High priority because many startup roles are on Ashby. Endpoint behavior should be verified per company.

smartrecruiters.coverage: Medium for larger companies using jobs.smartrecruiters.com.
smartrecruiters.company_token_source: Company slug in URLs such as https://jobs.smartrecruiters.com/{company}.
smartrecruiters.notes: Good candidate after Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby. Needs pagination handling.

workday.coverage: High for large enterprises, but endpoint shape varies by tenant and site.
workday.company_token_source: Tenant and site path from myworkdayjobs URLs.
workday.notes: Important for enterprise jobs. Requires per-tenant URL parsing and POST payload support.

icims.coverage: Medium; many enterprise career sites use company-specific iCIMS portals.
icims.company_token_source: Company-specific portal domain or iCIMS customer path.
icims.list_endpoint_pattern: company-specific; detect from iCIMS portal pages first
icims.notes: Do after higher-yield adapters. Some portals expose JSON; others require HTML parsing.

workable.coverage: Medium for smaller companies and startups.
workable.notes: Useful fallback adapter, but endpoint should be verified per company.

company_specific.coverage: Companies with custom career pages or ATS not covered above.
company_specific.company_token_source: A watched careers URL, sitemap, RSS feed, or Google query result.
company_specific.freshness_field: detected from page metadata, JSON-LD JobPosting datePosted, sitemap lastmod, or first_discovered_at
company_specific.notes: Use search fallback and company-specific lightweight adapters. Never let these disappear; mark as needs_review when parsing is uncertain.
